description: A perfect blend of comfort and style, the fila Kumi flip flop comes with a fabric twill strap and a cushioned footbed, that will never make you want to slide out of them.UpperFabric twill straps with a toe separator to lock the foot in placeCushioned PU footbed with brand name and collection style engraved on the heel and lateral toe regionfila brand embossing on the midfootOutsoleTPR outsole with brand logo styled lugs with brand name embossed in it for absolute grip and tractionSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
